jobs.description: Built a Python (FastAPI) backend synchronizing data across LINE, Google Calendar, and Sheets. Implemented OAuth 2.0 with a background scheduler for token management, and deployed the app on Google Cloud Platform (GCP) using Docker.

Developed a Django warehouse system with RBAC and LINE Notify, alongside a FastAPI and PyThaiNLP document generator. Configured a simulated production infrastructure on Ubuntu using Docker Compose and Nginx.
Initiated backend development by implementing core functionalities, user authentication, and an RBAC system using Django, with data managed via SQLite.

About.heading: About Me
About.p1: Hello! I am <highlight>Khunnapat Thubphung (Pe)</highlight>, a Computer Engineering graduate (2nd Class Honors) from Naresuan University. I am a passionate problem solver dedicated to building efficient and scalable software.
About.p2: My experience spans end-to-end application development. I have designed robust backend APIs and managed databases using technologies such as <highlight>FastAPI</highlight> and <highlight>PostgreSQL</highlight>, and built responsive mobile interfaces using <highlight>React Native</highlight>. Beyond writing code, I have hands-on experience handling deployments on <highlight>Google Cloud Platform</highlight> using <highlight>Docker</highlight>, and I am highly interested in integrating <highlight>Machine Learning</highlight> models into practical systems to solve real-world problems.
About.p3: I am constantly open to learning and updating my technical stack. Currently, I am diving deep into backend development with <highlight>Golang</highlight>, focusing on <highlight>Clean Architecture</highlight> to ensure my code is both testable and highly maintainable.
About.p4: My goal is to leverage my engineering skills, analytical thinking, and commitment to industry best practices to build products that excel in both system architecture and real-world usability.

items.title: Dog Breed Identification App
items.description: Built a responsive mobile interface using React Native, integrated with an EfficientNet machine learning model to classify dog breeds.
